levels_1_2_dominant.rationale: Beginning learners need intensive scaffolding and pre-teaching

levels_3_4_dominant.rationale: Intermediate learners benefit from smaller groups and structured practice

levels_5_6_dominant.rationale: Advanced learners need complex discourse modeling and analytical tasks

mixed_wide_range.rationale: Wide proficiency range (4+ levels) requires differentiated stations or dual support

newcomer_high.rationale: High newcomer count demands intensive L1 pre-teaching

planning_time_low.warning: Planning time below 45 minutes limits high-intensity model fidelity

equity_rules.warning_message: Equity risk: avoid One Teach/One Assist/Observe as the primary model.

selection_algorithm.step_1: Identify dominant WIDA band (levels_1_2, levels_3_4, levels_5_6) or mixed_wide_range
selection_algorithm.step_4: Filter avoid lists and equity rules
selection_algorithm.step_5: Return top model from remaining list; fall back to 'parallel' if list empty
